name: RETROPHARYNGEAL ABSCESS / HEMORRHAGE
definition: PREVERTEBRAL ABSCESS spread of infection within retropharyngeal space

demographics.Etiology: tonsillitis, suppurative lymphadenitis, pharyngitis, otitis media, infection of oral
demographics.Age: usually 2-4 (range, 1-6) years (atrophy of nodes with age)

discriminating_features: thickness of retropharyngeal space > ¾ of AP diameter of vertebral body:
may contain locules of gas / gas-fluid levels

general: thickness of retropharyngeal space > ¾ of AP diameter of vertebral body:
may contain locules of gas / gas-fluid levels
US: loss of normal bow-tie shape of retropharyngeal space

look carefully for possible ingested foreign body
clinical.Cx: (1)  Inferior extension through anatomic "danger space" into mediastinum
